headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Slides As Trump Warns Iran To 'Get Serious Soon'; Oil Prices Surge Higher (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones index fell Thursday as Trump warned Iran to "get serious soon" about a peace deal. Oil prices surged.
